characters.name: Alley Monster
characters.description: The Alley Monster is an evil hairy beast found in the dark alley's of theLower Yeast Side. The Monster appears as one of the main antagonists in "Thug Loaf". Where he follows the breadwinners into theRocket Vanwith theBiker ducksand attempts to eat them. Until he falls out of it and onto the biker ducks below him.

characters.name: Biker Ducks
characters.description: The Biker Ducks are the roughest and toughest ducks from theLower Yeast Sidewho hateSwaySwayandBuhdeuce. Even though they hate Breadwinners, they love stealing their bread. They are also very good at breaking into security systems (Thug Loaf). It was revealed at the end ofPondgea's Got Talentthat Jenny was already in a relationship with their Leader. They drive their bikes in a "V" shape and come equipped with Leather Jackets, Spiked Helmets, sideburns and black leather boots. The Leader also sports a beard and sunglasses.

characters.name: Bill and Bob
characters.description: Bill and Bob are teen monsters who have appeared only in "Bad Zituation". Bill is voiced by Max Mittelman, and Bob is voiced by Trevor Devall. They are blue and purple.

characters.name: Bread Foot (character)
characters.description: Bread Foot is a Nature Friend inBread Foot. However he turned out to be a wicked being when he hung the still alive SwaySway and Buhdeuce on his wall. In the end credits, he is voiced by Mick Wingert.

characters.name: Breadator (character)
characters.description: BreadatorFirst episodeBreadatorLatest episodeBreadatorVoiceImari WilliamsInspirationThe PredatorFestro from Secret Mountain Fort Awesome (Possibly)Full nameBreadatorPersonalityAggressive, playful, funny, depressed and lonely (revealed), teasing, hot-tempered, enthusiasticAppearanceMuscular, purple skin monsterAgeAdultOccupationBasketball playerGoalTo beat theBreadwinnersin basketball (succeeded, until it failed after he lost by the present breadwinners)HomeBread MinesEnemiesSwaySwayBuhdeuceBread MakerSwaySway's familyLikesFootball, cheating, teasing and annoying SwaySwayDislikesBreadwinnersBread MakerPowers and abilitiesBrute strengthFateLoses to Breadwinners, as he confesses to the audience that he was alone Festro from Secret Mountain Fort Awesome (Possibly) TheBreadatoris a tall and muscular purple creature who has an obsession with beating Breadwinners at basketball. SwaySway was unable to beat him (because he cheated) until he let Buhdeuce play. When he was defeated, SwaySway and Buhdeuce left him behind and he confessed to the audience that he was lonely.

characters.name: Breadbots
characters.description: BreadbotsFirst episodeRocket Trouble(only apperance)VoiceRobbie DaymondandEric Bauza(same asSwaySwayandBuhdeuce)Full nameSWAY3PO and B2D2PersonalityFormerly: Kind, robotic, caring, helpful, coolCurrently:Evil, determinedAppearanceRobotic versions of SwaySway and Buhduece.AlignmentGood, later badAgeDeceasedOccupationAutomobile robotsGoalTo take over SwaySway and Buhduece's lives (failed)EnemiesSwaySwayBuhdeuceKettaFateDrowning in a volcano. (same asSwaySwayandBuhdeuce) TheBreadbots,SWAY3POandB2D2are robotic duplicates ofSwaySwayandBuhdeucedesigned byKetta. They appeared in the episode "Rocket Trouble". SwaySway and Budeuce originally use them as helpers, but the robots eventually try to replace the Breadwinners. At the end of the episode, they are destroyed when they are tricked into "delivering" a loaf of bread to one of the volcanoes nearKetta's Auto-Tune Up. They are voiced by the same actors asSwaySwayandBuhdeuce.
